title: DecisionLedgerRecord
description: Authoritative JSON Schema for a single append-only decision ledger record (BOS-DATA-02). Sibling to contracts/events.schema.json. Mirrors its discriminated-union pattern: a $defs block of named sub-schemas, a discriminator on decision_type with a mapping, and a oneOf over six typed payload $refs. The outcome label (BOS5) is NEVER written into this record at decision time; it is joined later by decision_id (D-04 no-leakage guard).

decision_id.title: Decision Id
decision_id.description: Stable unique id for this decision ledger record. The join key BOS5 outcome labels attach to after the fact (D-04).

decision_type.title: Decision Type
decision_type.description: Discriminator over the six closed decision kinds (D-02). Exactly these six values and no others.

created_at.title: Created At
created_at.description: Record write timestamp (when this decision was appended to the ledger).

as_of.title: As Of
as_of.description: Immutable point-in-time event-state pointer into the BOS3 event stream identifying the state the recommendation was made against (D-01, D-03). UPSTREAM ASSUMPTION D-07: BOS3 must expose a stable, immutable as-of pointer (event sequence number or snapshot id) that this field references. This field's exact shape is reconciled when BOS3 lands; the small object below is a placeholder shape carrying event sequence number and/or snapshot id.

event_seq.title: Event Seq
event_seq.description: BOS3 event sequence number at the as-of point. Reconciled with BOS3.

snapshot_id.title: Snapshot Id
snapshot_id.description: Optional BOS3 snapshot id for the as-of state. Reconciled with BOS3.

feature_snapshot.title: Feature Snapshot
feature_snapshot.description: Frozen copy of the exact feature vector used at decision time (D-03). Captured at decision time and immutable; makes each record a self-contained, reproducible training row alongside the as_of pointer (belt-and-suspenders).

entity_ref.title: Entity Ref
entity_ref.description: Stable references to the entities this decision targets: task, session, agent, and/or swarm assignment ids (D-08). UPSTREAM ASSUMPTION D-07: BOS3 must define stable entity IDs the ledger can reference. Cross-source identity resolution is deferred to BOS12 (BOS-INT-03); BOS4 only locks this local entity-ref field shape.

autonomy_band.title: Autonomy Band
autonomy_band.description: The autonomy band in effect for this decision (D-06). The concrete band values are governed by BOS6 governance; this field records the band string at decision time.

recommended_action.title: Recommended Action
recommended_action.description: What the system proposed at decision time (D-05). Open object because action shape varies by decision_type.

human_verdict.title: Human Verdict
human_verdict.description: The human verdict on this recommendation (D-05). Honors the non-negotiable human-override governance constraint and maximal auditability. NOTE (D-06 override-as-signal): the divergence between recommended_action and actual_action under a verdict is an explicit captured training signal; it is observable from the three action fields and documented here, not derived into a separate field.

verdict.title: Verdict
verdict.description: The verdict kind. Exactly these four values and no fifth (D-05).

actor_id.title: Actor Id
actor_id.description: Stable id of the human actor who issued the verdict.

actual_action.title: Actual Action
actual_action.description: What was actually taken after the verdict (D-05). Open object, same modeling as recommended_action. The gap between recommended_action and actual_action under a verdict is an explicit captured training signal (D-06).

rationale.title: Rationale
rationale.description: Explainability field capturing why the recommendation was made, satisfying PROJECT.md §Trust 'explainable recommendations'. String form; may be structured prose.

payload.title: Payload
payload.description: Typed payload discriminated by decision_type. oneOf over the six payload $refs.

TaskToAgentPayload.title: TaskToAgentPayload
TaskToAgentPayload.description: Payload for decision_type = task_to_agent. References the candidate/chosen agent for the task.

candidate_agents.title: Candidate Agents
candidate_agents.description: Ranked candidate agent ids considered for the task.

chosen_agent_id.title: Chosen Agent Id
chosen_agent_id.description: The agent id recommended for the task.

AutonomyBandPayload.title: AutonomyBandPayload
AutonomyBandPayload.description: Payload for decision_type = autonomy_band. The proposed/selected autonomy band.

proposed_band.title: Proposed Band
proposed_band.description: The autonomy band the recommendation proposed.

current_band.title: Current Band
current_band.description: The autonomy band in effect before this decision, for divergence analysis.

reason.title: Reason
reason.description: Why the band change was proposed.

ReviewDepthPayload.title: ReviewDepthPayload
ReviewDepthPayload.description: Payload for decision_type = review_depth. The proposed review depth level.

proposed_depth.title: Proposed Depth
proposed_depth.description: The review depth level the recommendation proposed (e.g. none, light, full).

target_ref.title: Target Ref
target_ref.description: Reference to the artifact under review (task id, PR id, etc.).

reason.title: Reason
reason.description: Why this review depth was proposed.

ValidationDepthPayload.title: ValidationDepthPayload
ValidationDepthPayload.description: Payload for decision_type = validation_depth. The proposed validation depth level.

proposed_depth.title: Proposed Depth
proposed_depth.description: The validation depth level the recommendation proposed (e.g. none, smoke, full suite).

target_ref.title: Target Ref
target_ref.description: Reference to the artifact to validate (task id, PR id, build id, etc.).

reason.title: Reason
reason.description: Why this validation depth was proposed.

EscalationPayload.title: EscalationPayload
EscalationPayload.description: Payload for decision_type = escalation. The escalation target / reason.

escalation_target.title: Escalation Target
escalation_target.description: Who or what the decision escalates to (human role, channel, on-call id, etc.).

source_ref.title: Source Ref
source_ref.description: Reference to the triggering artifact or event.

NoActionPayload.title: NoActionPayload
NoActionPayload.description: Payload for decision_type = no_action. The no-action record; near-empty beyond a reason.

reason.title: Reason
reason.description: Why no action was the recommendation.
